meaning: n.[建](尤指)教堂半圆形的后殿
examples: This poor pooch looks ready to collie-apse.
A similar rocky protrusion was noticed in the north apse.
Highly praised when it was installed, the polyptych was removed from the apse soon after 1555, dismantled, and its many panels dispersed.
This is a 12th-Century church, lined with a shimmering apse mosaic.
